case_title: RAFAEL BAZILE VS. TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, IN. et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO MARCELEE WATKINS BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-15-2012 AT 10:00 AM.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-15-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CASE SET FOR 7-5-12, BUT PLAINTIFF'S COPY OF CLAIM HAS TODAY'S DATE, 6-20-12. PARTIES APPEARED. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT THC, INC. ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED ON 8/15/12 TO DEFENDANT MARCELEE WATKINS, "UNCLAIMED/MOVED LEFT NO ADDRESS".
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-16-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, IN.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAZILE, RAFAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, IN. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST MARCELEE WATKINS IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY BAZILE, RAFAEL AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, IN. WATKINS, MARCELEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAZILE, RAFAEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, IN.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2012 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAZILE, RAFAEL AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, IN.
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER OF MAILED TO MARCELEE WATKINS.
